args:
import struct
p='enc.db'
d=bytearray(open(p,'rb').read())
USER=256+16+32
FM=256+256+16+16+4
o=0
uc=struct.unpack_from('<i',d,o)[0]; o+=4
out=bytearray(d[:o+uc*USER]); o+=uc*USER
fc=struct.unpack_from('<i',d,o)[0]; out+=d[o:o+4]; o+=4
for _ in range(fc):
    m=bytearray(d[o:o+FM]); o+=FM
    user=bytes(m[:256]).split(b'\0',1)[0]
    name=bytes(m[256:512]).split(b'\0',1)[0]
    elen=struct.unpack_from('<i',m,544)[0]
    data=d[o:o+elen] if elen>0 else b''
    if elen>0:
        o+=elen
    if user==b'user1' and name==b'file1':
        struct.pack_into('<i',m,544,0)
        out+=m
    else:
        out+=m+data
open(p,'wb').write(out)
